All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

P

pauseGeneralTimer() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Pauses the general timer.
peekDiscard() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Deck
Returns the top card of the discard pile without removing it.
pendingAceIndex - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
 
placeCard(Card) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Places a card on the table and updates the sum.
placeInitialCard() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Deals one card face up from the deck and places it on the table, initializing the table sum with that card's value.
playCard(int, Deck) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.AbstractPlayer
Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.
playCard(int, Deck) - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.
PlayerEliminatedException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.PlayerEliminatedException
Constructs a PlayerEliminatedException for the given player.
playerName - Variable in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.PlayerEliminatedException
Name of the eliminated player who attempted the action.
players - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Ordered list of players still in the game.
playHumanCard(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Plays a non-Ace card from the human player's hand at the given index.
playHumanCardWithAceValue(int, int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Plays the Ace card at the given hand index with the human-chosen value, bypassing the automatic value selection in Card.getValue(int).
playSelectedCard() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Plays the currently keyboard-selected card, equivalent to clicking it.
